'''鈭歠-d-sh''' ('''kafadash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberalize|liberalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberalize|liberalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-d-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafadash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadash|thifadash]] || [[word:jifadash|jifadash]] || [[word:shifadash|shifadash]] || [[word:kifadash|kifadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadash|thuthufadash]] || [[word:jujufadash|jujufadash]] || [[word:shushufadash|shushufadash]] || [[word:kukufadash|kukufadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadash|thufadash]] || [[word:jufadash|jufadash]] || [[word:shufadash|shufadash]] || [[word:kufadash|kufadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadash|thufadash]] || [[word:jufadash|jufadash]] || [[word:shufadash|shufadash]] || [[word:kufadash|kufadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadash|thefadash]] || [[word:jefadash|jefadash]] || [[word:shefadash|shefadash]] || [[word:kefadash|kefadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadash|thothofadash]] || [[word:jojofadash|jojofadash]] || [[word:shoshofadash|shoshofadash]] || [[word:kokofadash|kokofadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadash|thofadash]] || [[word:jofadash|jofadash]] || [[word:shofadash|shofadash]] || [[word:kofadash|kofadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadash|thofadash]] || [[word:jofadash|jofadash]] || [[word:shofadash|shofadash]] || [[word:kofadash|kofadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]] || [[word:fadash|fadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fadash|th忙fadash]] || [[word:j忙fadash|j忙fadash]] || [[word:sh忙fadash|sh忙fadash]] || [[word:k忙fadash|k忙fadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadash|thathafadash]] || [[word:jajafadash|jajafadash]] || [[word:shashafadash|shashafadash]] || [[word:kakafadash|kakafadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadash|thafadash]] || [[word:jafadash|jafadash]] || [[word:shafadash|shafadash]] || [[word:kafadash|kafadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadash|thafadash]] || [[word:jafadash|jafadash]] || [[word:shafadash|shafadash]] || [[word:kafadash|kafadash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadash|shafadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadash|goshafadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadash|gokishafadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadashn眉|shafadashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadashnkn眉|goshafadashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadashn眉|gokishafadashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadashsh毛|shafadashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadashnksh毛|goshafadashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadashsh毛|gokishafadashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadashro|shafadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadashnkro|goshafadashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadashro|gokishafadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadashmu|shafadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadashnkmu|goshafadashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadashmu|gokishafadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadashsher|shafadashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadashnksher|goshafadashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadashsher|gokishafadashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadashng|shafadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadashnkng|goshafadashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadashng|gokishafadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadashya|shafadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadashnkya|goshafadashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadashya|gokishafadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadashyam|shafadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadashnkyam|goshafadashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadashyam|gokishafadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadashn眉sh毛|shafadashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadashnkn眉sh毛|goshafadashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadashn眉sh毛|gokishafadashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadashn眉ro|shafadashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadashnkn眉ro|goshafadashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadashn眉ro|gokishafadashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadashn眉mu|shafadashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadashnkn眉mu|goshafadashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadashn眉mu|gokishafadashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadashsh毛n眉|shafadashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadashnksh毛n眉|goshafadashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadashsh毛n眉|gokishafadashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadashsh毛ro|shafadashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadashnksh毛ro|goshafadashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadashsh毛ro|gokishafadashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadashsh毛mu|shafadashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadashnksh毛mu|goshafadashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadashsh毛mu|gokishafadashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadashron眉|shafadashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadashnkron眉|goshafadashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadashron眉|gokishafadashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadashrosh毛|shafadashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadashnkrosh毛|goshafadashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadashrosh毛|gokishafadashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadashromu|shafadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadashnkromu|goshafadashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadashromu|gokishafadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadashmun眉|shafadashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadashnkmun眉|goshafadashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadashmun眉|gokishafadashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadashmush毛|shafadashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadashnkmush毛|goshafadashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadashmush毛|gokishafadashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadashmuro|shafadashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadashnkmuro|goshafadashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadashmuro|gokishafadashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
